name: OpenID4VP style and API audit
scope: public facade shape for identity-sdk consumption
sibling reallyme/wallet and reallyme/identity-sdk integration surfaces

records.summary: Public crate roots only declare focused modules and explicit supported facade exports.

evidence: manual scan excludes generated Buffa and Connect code
records.summary: Handwritten source avoids wildcard imports and wildcard exports; generated code remains isolated under crates/proto/openid4vp/src/generated.
Protocol, verifier, wallet, runtime, and proto codec errors use fixed enum reason taxonomies without arbitrary string payloads.
Buffa messages, Connect services, and codec adapters are the first-class SDK/service boundary; JSON helpers map generated protobuf JSON rather than defining a second wire model.

OpenIDVC and OpenIDVP currently keep protocol-specific proto contracts independent and use JSON bytes for externally specified structures such as metadata, JWK-like material, claims, and DCQL. There is no shared sibling proto type that OpenIDVP should import today.
The root OpenIDVP facade mirrors reallyme/openidvc and is consumed by identity-sdk through sibling OpenIDVP crates and final-shape facade tests.

The wallet repository imports this repository's OpenIDVP proto instead of redeclaring request/response messages, and its conformance tests enforce DCQL OpenIDVP fixtures rather than Presentation Exchange.
